businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur sous la surface du fluide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad bajo la superficie del fluido.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate hydrostatic pressure at the bottom of a fluid column.
description.long: Calculate hydrostatic pressure at the bottom of a fluid column.

short_i18n.en: Calculate hydrostatic pressure at the bottom of a fluid column.
short_i18n.tr: Akışkan sütununun tabanında oluşturduğu hidrostatik basıncı hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den hydrostatischen Druck am Boden einer Fluidsäule.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la pression hydrostatique au fond d'une colonne de fluide.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la presión hidrostática en el fondo de una columna de fluido.
short_i18n.ar: احسب الضغط الهيدروستاتيكي في قاع عمود سائل.

title_i18n.fr: Calculateur de pression statique de fluide
